LanguageData.RoomService_Settings_AllowGuestMedicalBe: Allow guest beds to be set as medical
LanguageData.RoomService_Settings_ChargeForBedOccupan: Charge for time spent holding a bed
LanguageData.RoomService_Settings_EnableMedicalGuestE: Guests may arrive needing a specific operation
LanguageData.RoomService_Settings_PersonalityReaction: Personality affects reactions (traits, growing experience, forced-slave reactions)
LanguageData.RoomService_Settings_EnableMealDelivery: Companions may bring hungry guests a meal in their room
LanguageData.RoomService_Settings_EnableSlaveCompanio: Allow slaves to be marked for companionship training
LanguageData.RoomService_ToggleBedDesc: A colonist with the Companionship work type enabled may invite a visiting guest here, for a price. Prefers their own bed if it's marked, but any marked bed that isn't someone else's will do - and the nicer the bed and room, the more they can charge.
LanguageData.RoomService_BrokeUnwavering: {0}'s unwavering loyalty has broken - they can now be recruited.
LanguageData.RoomService_MedicalGuestOfferText: {0} is missing their {1} and would benefit from having a {2} installed. A colony doctor can perform the operation once one is available in your stockpiles - the bill will simply wait until then. Offer to treat them, for a fee?
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_FeatureDisabled: companionship service is disabled in mod settings
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_WorkTagDisabled: Companionship work type not enabled for this pawn
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_GuestNotArrived: guest hasn't arrived at the colony yet
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_GuestDismissive: guest is in a dismissive mood and doesn't want to talk right now
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_GuestBusy: guest's current activity can't be interrupted
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_OpinionTooLow: guest's opinion of this pawn is too low
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_CannotInitiate: this pawn cannot initiate social interaction right now
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_CannotReceive: guest cannot receive social interaction right now
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_NotAttractedToGuest: this pawn isn't attracted to the guest's gender
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_GuestNotAttracted: guest isn't attracted to this pawn's gender
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_IdeoUnwilling: this pawn's ideoligion forbids lovin' with a non-spouse
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_GuestIdeoUnwilling: guest's ideoligion forbids lovin' with a non-spouse
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_OnCooldown: guest was just propositioned recently, on cooldown
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_CannotReachGuest: cannot reach or reserve the guest
LanguageData.RoomService_Reason_CannotReachBed: cannot reach or reserve the bed
